personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Big Data, PySpark & ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building data pipelines, high-scale telemetry platforms, performance engineering systems, and ML-enabled capacity forecasting workflows. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark, Hadoop/Hive, ETL design, data quality, distributed processing, and production operational reporting. Experienced translating raw infrastructure and application telemetry into reliable datasets, forecasting outputs, dashboards, and executive-ready insights for large enterprise environments.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization processes with repeatable data workflows.
Built large-scale data processing and forecasting workflows using Python, PySpark, Spark, SQL, and AWS services including S3, Glue, EC2, ECS, and Redshift.
Developed ML forecasting pipelines with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks up to 6 months ahead, improving infrastructure planning and production readiness.
Designed historical Oracle schemas and Redshift-backed analytics structures to support seasonal forecasting, reporting, retention, and operational decision-making.
Integrated monitoring and infrastructure feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with validation, reconciliation, and executive dashboards.
Containerized Python ETL pipeline jobs on EC2/ECS to support scalable, on-demand processing for capacity forecasting and telemetry analysis.
Implemented data quality checks, troubleshooting routines, and operational reporting to improve reliability of recurring capacity and performance data products.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting transaction tracing, performance visibility, and production monitoring.
Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating web systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace AppMon from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring coverage.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME across an enterprise environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, reducing dependency on manual weekly exports.
Designed dashboards, alert thresholds, and SLA views used by client teams to monitor application performance and operational risk.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, resource bottlenecks, JDBC pressure, heap behavior, CPU usage, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to provide real-time visibility during performance test cycles.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams as release gate decision inputs.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, supporting transaction volumes described internally as 10x VISA scale.
Optimized C++ and OCCI transaction processing to reduce physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation processes to protect integrity during phased migration cutover.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, and XML messaging interfaces in VC++ with DB2 backend integration.
Worked within government system architecture standards requiring disciplined documentation, traceability, and reliability.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Maintained AMDOCS billing, EDI, Enabler, CSM, EMS, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full billing lifecycle workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere system administration using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an ML-enabled capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Replaced manual forecasting workflows, reduced forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck forecasts 6 months ahead for enterprise infrastructure planning.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent patterns, optimized Parquet/Snappy storage, and improved ETL access patterns for enterprise-scale analytics.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python pipeline that performs semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered job scoring, resume tailoring, cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and Grok API.
